widgets.title: Announcement Bar
widgets.description: Configurable announcement bar with icon, title, description, and optional CTA. Use for advisories, welcome messages, or other top-of-page notices.

widgets.title: Course Carousel
widgets.description: Horizontally scrollable carousel of course cards with previous/next controls. Use for 'What's New', 'Featured Courses', etc.

properties.name: section_subtitle
properties.label: Section subtitle
properties.default: The latest courses, labs, and certifications.

properties.name: items_json
properties.label: Courses (JSON array)
properties.default: [{"title":"Getting Started with Customer Success","description":"Learn the foundations of CS workflows.","image_url":"","badge":"New","duration":"45 min","link_url":"#"},{"title":"Community Manager Essentials","description":"Build healthy, engaged communities.","image_url":"","badge":"Updated","duration":"30 min","link_url":"#"},{"title":"Skilljar LMS Admin Fundamentals","description":"Set up your first academy.","image_url":"","badge":"","duration":"60 min","link_url":"#"},{"title":"Staircase AI Quickstart","description":"Unlock customer intelligence in 15 minutes.","image_url":"","badge":"New","duration":"15 min","link_url":"#"},{"title":"PX In-App Guide Builder","description":"Design effective onboarding flows.","image_url":"","badge":"","duration":"25 min","link_url":"#"},{"title":"CE Program Launch Playbook","description":"Ship a customer academy end-to-end.","image_url":"","badge":"Featured","duration":"90 min","link_url":"#"}]

widgets.title: Feedback CTA
widgets.description: Dark-blue call-to-action strip inviting users to share feedback. Title, description, and a primary button.

properties.name: description
properties.label: Description
properties.default: We're always looking to improve. Tell us what's working and what's not.

widgets.title: Hero Banner
widgets.description: Dark gradient hero banner with eyebrow, large title (gradient text accent), subtitle, and decorative artwork.

properties.name: subtitle
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.default: Your gateway to training, certifications, and product mastery across the Gainsight platform.

widgets.title: Info Card Pair
widgets.description: A pair of large outlined cards with icon, title, description, and CTA. Used for 'More Ways to Learn' (ILT, Certifications).

properties.name: card_a_description
properties.label: Card A — description
properties.default: Join live sessions with Gainsight experts and build skills with hands-on practice.

properties.name: card_b_description
properties.label: Card B — description
properties.default: Prove your expertise with official Gainsight certifications and digital badges.

widgets.title: Product Catalog Grid
widgets.description: A responsive grid of product cards (icon, title, description, link). Default content covers Gainsight's 6 product areas; customize the JSON to override.

properties.name: section_subtitle
properties.label: Section subtitle
properties.default: Find learning paths for each product in the Gainsight platform.

properties.name: items_json
properties.label: Products (JSON array)
properties.default: [{"title":"Customer Success","description":"Drive retention and expansion with proven CS workflows.","icon_url":"https://everpath-course-content.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/accounts/20031/original/CS-icon.png","link_url":"#","link_label":"Start learning"},{"title":"Customer Communities","description":"Build engaged communities where customers help customers.","icon_url":"https://everpath-course-content.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/accounts/20031/original/CC-icon.png","link_url":"#","link_label":"Start learning"},{"title":"Product Experience","description":"Deliver in-app guidance, surveys, and analytics.","icon_url":"https://everpath-course-content.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/accounts/20031/original/PX-icon.png","link_url":"#","link_label":"Start learning"},{"title":"Skilljar","description":"Create customer training programs that scale.","icon_url":"https://everpath-course-content.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/accounts/20031/original/SJ-icon.png","link_url":"#","link_label":"Start learning"},{"title":"Staircase AI","description":"Predict churn and expansion with customer intelligence.","icon_url":"https://everpath-course-content.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/accounts/20031/original/ST-icon.png","link_url":"#","link_label":"Start learning"},{"title":"Customer Education","description":"Launch certifications and academies for your customers.","icon_url":"https://everpath-course-content.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com/accounts/20031/original/CE-icon.png","link_url":"#","link_label":"Start learning"}]

widgets.title: Role Tile Grid
widgets.description: A compact grid of role/persona tiles, each linking to a role-specific learning path. Great for 'Explore by Role'.

properties.name: section_subtitle
properties.label: Section subtitle
properties.default: Tailored paths for admins, end users, builders, and program owners.
